event_info: back of a length and angling across; Jaiswal taps it to point to get off the mark
unusual from Sooryavanshi; taps a back of a length delivery to cover point and sets off for an easy single
good away movement for Arora; on a length in the channel around off stump; he gets some extra bounce; Jaiswal looks to force it off the back foot and misses it
hammered away; too much width on offer outside off; Jaiswal gets on top of it and square drives it to deep backward point; that raced away!
shorter and angling across; Jaiswal walks down the track and guides it to short third man
nice line; on a length and targetting the stumps; Jaiswal pushes it to covers and sets off for a single; sent back!
he's put it away; bread and butter for him; speared in full on the pads; Sooryavanshi flicks it effortlessly off his legs to deep mid-wicket
good comeback; banged in short and on the stumps; this one hurried onto him as he taps it to the off side

streaky but he will take it; the slip was moved for this ball and it exactly went between the keeper and the short third man fielder; on a length and angling across; Sooryavanshi pokes at it away from the body; but the edge fell safely and raced away to the fence
angling across the left hander; Sooryavanshi gets behind the line and defends it
angling across on the pads; he gets a bit of extra bounce; Sooryavanshi looks to defend; but the ball hits his gloves
straying on the pads; Sooryavanshi flicsk it to deep mid-wicket for a single; it has been a quiet start from the openers so far
back of a length and angling in from round the wicket; Sooryavanshi taps it to gully for a quick single
cheeky and it almost went all the way. Short and outside off; Jaiswal allows the ball to come onto the bat and upper cuts it over the fielder to third man; one bounce and into the fence

almost a run out; full and on middle; Jaiswal plays it off his legs towards wide mid on and sets off for a single; Vaibhav was watching the ball and Jaiswal had to rush back as he was almost half way down the track
angling in from outside off; pushed back to the bowler
bit of inward movement; Jaiswal was early into the expansive drive and edges it onto the pads
full and outside off; Jaiswal hangs back and pushes it to covers; straight to the fielder; good comeback from Green after the boundary
that has been hammered away; poor delivery; short and angling across; Sooryavanshi gets on top of the bounce nicely and smashes it to sweeper cover

another one; short and outside off; Sooryavanshi stands tall and cuts it in the air towards point; the fielder dived to his left; but the ball just bounced in front of him and raced away; he could have stopped it
on the pads; Sooryavanshi works it away to short mid-wicket
good stop by the fielder; saved a certain boundary; back of a length and outside off; Jaiswal cuts it to gully; the fielder dived to his left and saved 3 runs
clever shot; it was banged in short on the stumps; Sooryavanshi hangs back; allows the ball to come onto the bat; uses the pace well and upper cuts it to third man
slightly short and angling across; Sooryavanshi dabs it to cover
tossed up and outside off; Sooryavanshi goes for an expansive drive and misses it
he's picked it this time; tossed up and on middle; Sooryavanshi kneels down and launches it over the fielder to deep square leg
tossed up outside off and turning away; Sooryavanshi goes for a wild slog and misses it
slightly shorter and turning away; too close to cut; Sooryavanshi hits it straight to the fielder at point
slower through the air and outside off; Sooryavanshi was hanging back in the crease; pushes it back to the bowler
quicker and flatter outside off; Sooryavanshi cuts it straight to the fielder at covers; just a 6 off the over; good start from Narine
that flies into the stands. Short and outside off; it sits up well for the across the line shot; Jaiswal was hanging back in the crease; picks it and hoicks it over deep mid-wicket
Jaiswal moves across to the leg side; Green looks to bowl the full and wide delivery; but it's too wide
nice delivery; full and outside off; Jaiswal digs it to point and sets off for a quick single

in the slot and outside off; Sooryavanshi was rooted to the crease; gets under the ball nicely and biffs it straight down the ground; the abll just hit the ropes on the full; the partnership between Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal is now 55
full and wide from over the wicket; Sooryavanshi leaves it alone
back of a length and angling across; too wide away from the left hander; pressure on Green
back of a length and angling across; Sooryavanshi slays it on the up to backward point; well stopped and they get a tight single

unbelievable shot from Jaiswal; full toss on middle; Jaiswal initially was shaping in to play the paddle shot; but changes his mind at the last minute and opens the bat face and laps it over the short third man fielder
good length and wide outside off stump
back of a length and outside off; Jaiswal swings and misses; it was close to a wide; but no signal from the umpire
shorter and on middle; Sooryavanshi stays back and works it away to mid-wicket
fuller and turning into the pads; Jaiswal misses out on the flick shot
he's got it through this time; tossed up and outside off; Jaiswal reaches out to the ball and creams it to deep extra cover; found the gap and it raced away
on the pads; Jaiswal works it away to deep square leg and they come back for the second
flatter and shorter; Jaiswal punches it to point
slightly shorter and turning in; Sooryavanshi stays back and pushes it back to the bowler
full and in the slot; Jaiswal goes for the an booming drive away from the body and misses it
on a length and angling across; Jaiswal pushes it to mid-off

just short of Rinku in the deep; full and outside off; Sooryavanshi throws kitchen sink at it and slices it in the air to deep backward point; the fielder dives forward attempting the catch; but it fell just in front of him
good stop in the deep; on a length and on middle; Sooryavanshi whips it to long-on; the fielder covers good ground and keeps it just to a single
back of a length and outside off; Jaiswal cuts it square of the wicket
half volley outside off; Sooryavanshi absolutely drills it to deep extra cover; Rinku in the deep covers good ground and keeps it to just a single
short and on middle; Sooryavanshi punches it to mid-wicket
pushed through quicker outside off; Jaiswal was beaten by the extra pace as he looks to force it off the back foot
1 run; pitched outside leg; Jaiswal misses it and a huge shout of LBW was turned down

ball_event: out Caught by Ramandeep Singh!! Finally a breakthrough
event_info: tossed up and on middle; Sooryavanshi was looking for the slog sweep; was targetting the bigger part of the ground; didn't get it off the middle and skews in the air towards deep midwicket; the ball was swirling the air; but Ramandeep judges it to perfection and takes a sharp catch. 200 T20 wickets for Chakaravarthy. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Ramandeep Singh b Varun Chakaravarthy 46(28) [4s-6 6s-2]
tossed up and on middle; Jurel defends it to the off side
flatter and quicker; Jurel stays back and works it to short midwicket
slow and short; pulled behind square

banged in short; slower again; Druvel and rooted to the crease; gets into a good position and pulls it away towards fine leg; where Tyagi covers good ground; slides well and pulls it back just inches from the ropes; the third umpire checked different angles; only a couple
full and outside off; Jurel drives it down to long-off
full and wide outside off stump

innovation with control from Jaiswal; his favourite shot; full and on middle; Jaiswal moves across to the off side and scoops it over to fine leg; he fell over; but had connected it well to sail over the ropes
another side one; short and wide outside off stump
full and outside off; Jaiswal drives it down to long-off
back of a length and outside off ; Jurel whips it away to mid-wicket
tossed up just outside off; dropped into the gap wide of cover-point for a single
flighted delivery outside off - Yashasvi Jaiswal gets down low; rolls his wrists and then sweeps it in front of square on the on-side for a single

ball_event: out Stumped!! Has Dhruv Jurel been stumped here? Tim Seifert looks very confident and replays show that Jurel's feet is well outside the crease when the wickets were broken - OUT and Varun has his second wicket. Was a nicely tossed up delivery outside off and Jurel was shaping for the reverse sweep
event_info: misses it completely and Tim Seifert was quick to break the wickets. The momentum took Jurel out of the crease and he had no chance of dragging it back. Dhruv Jurel st Tim Seifert b Varun Chakaravarthy 5(7)
flighted delivery outside off - Parag leans across and defends it to the on-side
pushed through outside off - Parag plays with soft hands and the inside edge drops at his feet
flighted delivery on off; punched down to long-on - end of another wicket-taking over from Varun
tossed up just outside off - nudged behind square on the off-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Ajinkya Rahane!! A third wicket and KKR are fighting back into the contest. Nicely bowled by Narine - slowed down the pace and pushed it wider of off - made Jaiswal reach out on the drive and he isn't in any control
event_info: plays it uppishly and to the right of cover where Rahane slides to complete a fine catch. Can the spin twins choke the Royals in the middle overs? Yashasvi Jaiswal c Ajinkya Rahane b Sunil Narine 39(29) [4s-4 6s-2]
fraction short and wide of off; cut away backward of square on the off-side for a single
tossed up just outside off - Parag prods across and punches it to long-on
flighted delivery outside off - punched in front of square on the off-side for a single
Narine tosses one just outside off - punched off the back-foot to long-off for a couple
flighted delivery from round the wicket - punched square on the off-side for a single
tossed up just outside off - Riyan Parag lets the ball come and works it wide of mid-wicket for a single
tossed up on off; Hetmyer goes right back in defence
flatter and quicker on off; hacked down without any timing to long-on
flatter and wider of off; cut away square on the off-side for a single
tossed up on middle and leg; played with soft hands past mid-wicket - Hetmyer wanted a second and is sent back
short of a good length and just outside off - Hetmyer hangs back and gets a soft edge to mid-off
back of a length and at the pads; Hetmyer swivels across on the one-legged pull and misses; off the pad and rolls behind square leg for a single
tad fuller and wider of off; driven straight to the fielder at cover
slower short ball on off; pulled through square leg for a single
slower short ball outside off - Hetmyer was late on the pull; the ball catches the to-end and bounces through to the keeper
a full-toss and it's heaved wide of long-on - Powell ran across and made a half-stop; the ball slowed down and stopped in front of the ropes; keeping them down to a couple
tossed up just outside off - Parag is late on the drive and the ball rolls to the off-side off the toe-end

tossed up and sliding onto the right-hander - Parag swings across the line and misses - Varun is interested and KKR have reviewed. Looked like it was heading down leg to the naked eye. No bat and we're onto ball-tracking: Impact is umpire's call and it's going down leg - KKR lose a review
Parag breaks the shackles at last - shuffles across and then changes the stance; gets enough on the sweep to clear short third; one bounce and over the ropes. First boundary in 29 balls

ball_event: out Bowled!! .. Varun Chakaravarthy has his man now - he's having a nice afternoon
event_info: was tossed up and kept spinning back into the right-hander - Parag shuffles across and then looks to slog it over mid-wicket; plays all around the ball and misses it completely. The ball goes on and crashes into the off-stump; the zing bails light up and the Royals have lost their 4th wicket. Riyan Parag b Varun Chakaravarthy 12(14) [4s-1]
flighted delivery outside off; nudged into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a single
tossed up on off; blocked back at the bowler - superb numbers for Varun today; he ends with 3 for 14
tossed up and drifting away from the right-hander; draws Ferreira forward and goes past the outside edge
pushed through outside off - drifts away from the right-hander and goes past the outside edge
tossed up and spinning into the righty-hander; catches Ferreira's inside edge as he pressed forward
thumped; tad too full from Narine; it's right in the slot and lets Ferreira press across on the swing; high and wide of mid-wicket for a maximum
tossed up just outside off - Ferreira pushes with hard hands and the ball rolls to the off-side

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Simple catch and Narine ends his spell with a wicket - tossed up on off and it straightens onto the right-hander
event_info: Ferreira wasn't reading Narine one bit; looked to try and work it onto the on-side; closed the face of the bat and pops a simple return catch to the bowler. Donovan Ferreira c and b Sunil Narine 7(7) [6s-1]
slower short ball outside off - hit slightly high on Hetmyer's bat as he looked to pull; lobbed over mid-wicket and he's back for the second
low full-toss on the pads; clipped behind square on the on-side for a single
short of a good length and well wide of off; Jadeja slashes and misses
back of a length and on off; dabbed in front of square on the off-side for a single
the slower bouncer from Arora; loops past Hetmyer's head and is called as a wide

that's superb from Green - full-toss and Hetmyer heaved it past mid-wicket; was racing away until Green put in a big dive; after sprinting from square leg. A clean pick-up and he keeps them down to a couple
yorker length delivery on the pads; whipped in front of square on the on-side for a single
slower short ball outside off - swatted through mid-wicket for a single
Ramandeep keeps it full and outside off - RJ moves across and then sweeps it in front of square on the on-side; sprints hard and comes back for the second
clubbed; too short from Ramandeep - was bowled into the pitch; but it sits up for RJ to hammer the pull through square leg; runs away to the ropes
Ramandeep looks to slip in the wide yorker; but it's past the tramlines and has been wided
too full and too wide from Ramandeep; past the tramlines and it's another wide

another slower short ball outside off - RJ swivels across and miscues the heave towards mid-wicket - Anukul was the fielder in the deep; but he doesn't pick it and lets the ball bounce in front of him

a top-edge and Arora has put Hetmyer down; slower short ball that was pushed across the left-hander - Hetmyer was in no position on the pull; flapped the pull and the top-edge lobbed over backward square leg. Arora ran back; had it under controle; but then with hard hands to let the ball pop out
the wide yorker from Ramandeep; squeezed to the off-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! Lovely hands and Green completes a fine catch at deep backward square leg - banged in short and at the stumps
event_info: RJ swivelled across and didn't bother to keep the pull down. Green moved swiftly to his left; went with soft hands and completed a fine catch. Ravindra Jadeja c Cameron Green b Kartik Tyagi 9(7) [4s-1]
short and wide of off; Archer throws his hands on the back-foot drive and misses; called as a wide
full and at the stumps; Archer drills the drive back and the ball ricochets off the stjkps at the other end. It's only a single as the ball dribbles down to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Angkrish Raghuvanshi!! Hetmyer falls and the Royals can't get any momentum into their innings - a low full-toss on the pads
event_info: was a gift and Hetmyer was looking to whip it onto the on-side; closed the face of the bat and spoons a thick leading edge; high and behind square on the off-side - Raghuvanshi settles under the ball at third man and takes a simple catch. Shimron Hetmyer c Angkrish Raghuvanshi b Kartik Tyagi 15(18)
on a good length and well wide of off; Bishnoi throws his hands on the drive and misses

ball_event: out Caught by Tim Seifert!! Three in the over and Tyagi is on a roll - was the wide yorker
event_info: not the perfect length; but it gets the desired result. Bishnoi was looking to run it down to third man; played with an open face and the edge flies through to Tim Seifert. After a superb start; the Royals have simply crumbled here at the Eden Gardens. Ravi Bishnoi c Tim Seifert b Kartik Tyagi 0(2)
full-toss outside off - squeezed down to backward point
banged in short and just outside off - Archer swivels across; picks the length and then pulls it into the gap wide of long-on; comes back for the second
low full-toss on the pads; clipped behind square on the on-side for a single
banged in short and just outside off - Brijesh swivels across and misses it completely
short of a good length and at the body; pulled down to long leg for a single

a rare boundary and Arora isn't happy with the effort put in by Tyagi - short and into the pitch; Archer backed away and swung it behind square on the on-side - Fine leg came across and put in the dive; but to no avail

1 run; out Jofra Archer Run Out!!  A run-out to end the innings - RR finish with 155 - comical stuff; banged in short and at the stumps; Archer shuffled across on the pull and missed. They sneak in a bye - Tim Seifert has a shy and missed; Arora fails to collect the ball cleanly and it rolls down towards mid-on. They chance a second run; but Arora is quick on the ball and throws it towards the striker's end. Tim Seifert was quick onto the stumps and demolishes all the three stumps; with Archer not even in the frame. Jofra Archer run out (Vaibhav Arora/Tim Seifert) 8(5) [4s-1]

ball_event: out Bowled!! What a start from Jofra Archer. He is making it a habit to take a wicket off the very first ball. It's the third game in a row that he has done this. This was full and straight
event_info: just a hint of shape in and the ball clips the back pad. Seifert brings down the bat late and sees his off-stump shattered. Not the start KKR needed in this chase. Tim Seifert b Jofra Archer 0(1)
good length delivery swinging away outside off; Raghuvanshi gets a thick edge as he drives it to point
this one nips in and sneaks through bat-pad. Wasn't far from the stumps either. Beaten
banged in short at pace. Was quick and Raghuvanshi; who was looking to pull is late on the ball. Whispers past his ears through to the keeper
good length delivery outside off; defended to the off-side
sprayed down the leg-side with a bumper; wide called
shot! Allows the ball to come onto the bat and punches it wide of backward point. The pace of Archer ensures the ball races away in a hurry
good length delivery angling across the right-hander; Rahane turns it to short mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! Another one gone. Rahane continues to struggle in this IPL. Second duck in a row. The shot was on
event_info: but Rahane; in this form can't pick it. Short delivery outside off; Rahane goes for the cut; the ball bounces a tad extra and takes the outside edge to the right of the keeper. Jurel takes a regulation catch and KKR are 2 down in just 8 balls into the innings. Ajinkya Rahane c Dhruv Jurel b Nandre Burger 0(2)
shapes away from Green; who gets a thick outside edge on the push to cover-point
nearly chopped on. Raghuvanshi tries to ride on the bounce; the ball takes the inside edge and rolls wide of leg-stump
short and wide outside off; Green won't miss out on that. Stands tall and slaps the cut through cover-point. Raced away for four
and again. This wasn't that short; but he had the width to free his arms. Green stays low and cuts it to the same part of the ground for back-to-back fours
good length delivery outside off; Raghuvanshi dabs it to the right of third man for a run
Green is on a roll. He is deal with boundaries. His third is just the 4th ball. Angled in at the body; Green gets a tickle down to fine leg. Well past the short fine leg fielder
peach of a delivery. Green had no answers for that. Pitches on 4th stump and nips away past the outside edge on a good length. Wasn't far from the edge. Was a scrambled seam
good length delivery outside off; defended to the off-side
touch shortish outside off at 143.3ks. Green mistimes the cut to cover and sets off for a quick single. Makes it to the other end with ease
Raghuvanshi was initially looking to duck this 143.7ks bumper. He sees the ball not climbing enough and decides to defend it off the back foot
good length delivery anlging across Green. Tapped to cover-point
short but not wide enough to free his arms. Raghuvanshi punches it to cover off the back foot
back of a length delivery outside off; pushed to the right of cover for a quick single

not a great shot selection from Green. Gets beaten by a long way to a short and well wide delivery outside off. He was looking to flat bat it over the bowler's head. The ball bounces over the bat and through to the keeper
in the slot and Green deposits it into the stands. Full and on middle; Green clears his front foot and smokes it over deep mid-wicket. First six of the innings
Green goes after Burger yet again. This time he doesn't get a hang of it. Hits it off the toe end and clears mid-wicket. Couple more to the tally
flatter delivery angled in; Raghuvanshi tucks it to long-on
flatter delivery that skids on the surface. Green looks to cut and gets it off the toe end. The ball raced away down to third man fence
loopy leg-break on off; defended to cover

out Stumped!! How good was this from Jurel! Bishnoi sees Green charge down the wicket and bowls a googly down leg. The ball turns futher down leg and makes it hard for Jurel as he was blinded by the batter. He dives to his left; collects the ball and throws it direct to the stumps one-handed. Green was well down the track and couldn't recover. Third umpire has a look just to confirm and the right decision is been made. Cameron Green st Dhruv Jurel b Ravi Bishnoi 27(13) [4s-4 6s-1]
flighted delivery outside off; driven straight to cover. A misfield from the fielder allows the batter to get off the mark with a single
shortish outside off; punches to cover-point
worng'un on middle; bunted down to long-on
fuller delivery on the pads; driven down to long-on
fuller delivery on the pads; Raghuvanshi drives it down to long-on
width on offer and Punja pays the penalty. Powell gets under the ball and pumps it over cover. That was more of a free-hit for Powell
another gift from Punja. Loopy delivery ends up as a high full toss. Rovman Powell heaves it over mid-wicket. Clears the fielder in the deep comfortably
flatter delivery outside off; Powell pats it to point
Powell is way early on the pull. The ball takes the toe end of the bat and flies wide of Punja's reach for a single
Jadeja nearly pulled off a brilliant return catch. This ball stops on Powell; who got a leading edge back to Jadeja. He dives forward and tries to get both hands under. Just out of his reach
flatter on middle; turned to the on-side
darted in on off; pushed to the off-side
another flatter delivery from Jadeja; Raghuvanshi can't put it away
touch short on off; Raghuvanshi cuts it to point

ball_event: out Lbw!! Excellent over from Jadeja. Just one run and a wicket of Raghuvanshi. He was looking to reverse sweep Jadeja. Not the shot to be playing for someone who is so accurate with his line and length. He misses a full delivery and is pinged right in front of off. Burns the review. KKR are in deep trouble now. Angkrish Raghuvanshi lbw b Ravindra Jadeja 10(19) [4s-1]
event_info: out Lbw!! Excellent over from Jadeja. Just one run and a wicket of Raghuvanshi. He was looking to reverse sweep Jadeja. Not the shot to be playing for someone who is so accurate with his line and length. He misses a full delivery and is pinged right in front of off. Burns the review. KKR are in deep trouble now. Angkrish Raghuvanshi lbw b Ravindra Jadeja 10(19) [4s-1]
spin for Yash Raj Punja. Lands on a length just outside off and spins past the defensive outside edge of Powell
fraction short; there's a bit of spin; Powell rocks back to cut and misses
93.2kph; tossed up ball; full in length; Powell pushes it to point for a quick single. There's a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Powell is in
leg-lined flighted delivery; nudged through square leg and Rinku gets off the mark
94.2kph; googly; spinning down leg; Powell stays back to flick and may have got a faint inside edge. The ball dribbles away to the fine leg fence
95.6kph; in-drifter on leg; Powell nudges it to square leg
full ball drifting in towards the pads; clipped through square leg
95.6kph; flat and quick; flicked through square leg
93.3kph; full delivery and Powell inside-edges the defensive push back to the bowler
96.2kph; Powell jogs down the pitch to work this in-dart on middle-leg to midwicket
94.4kph; over the wicket to the left-hander. On a length and wide of off; stabbed in front of square on the off-side
full delivery; Powell pushes it to backward point and eyes a single; gets sent back by Rinku Singh
googly outside off; cut away to the right of deep backward point where Shimron Hetmyer makes a diving stop to save a couple of runs
94.1kph; leg-lined googly; worked through midwicket
googly on a short of length and the line is down leg
flighted delivery; full outside off; driven hard and straight to cover
shortened length outside off; quicker one; Powell pats it to the left of backward point
95.1kph; googly; Rinku clips it into the leg-side off the inside edge and Bishnoi is quick to get to the ball
101.5kph; darted in on middle-leg; Powell glances towards backward square leg. Just 7 runs off the over

ball_event: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! Holes out! Second wicket for Jadeja. 92.8kph
event_info: stump-to-stump line and on a length; Powell advances and clears his front leg to smoke it over long-on. He isn't close to the pitch of the ball and the timing goes awry as it comes off lower part of the bat. Ferreira makes no mistake at long-on. Rovman Powell c Donovan Ferreira b Ravindra Jadeja 23(20) [4s-2 6s-1]
pushed along the ground to long-off
inverses his stance for a big swing and inside-edges towards short third man
swung away to deep midwicket
spins in from a length outside off; Rinku cuts and misses

dropped! 106.8kph; quicker one outside off; Rinku Singh has an ugly swipe at it and the ball lobs up in the air off the leading edge. Burger; at short third man; settles under the skier; gets into a decent position as well but makes a mess of it in the end. Will it be a costly miss? Even Jurel moved a bit before stopping. That may have distracted the pacer. Jaddu certainly isn't happy with that effort
cut to deep backward point
shortish ball; Rinku Singh goes hard on the pull and the ball falls short of the forward-running deep midwicket fielder
spins away from a length; Ramandeep gets squared up as he defends from the crease. Beaten on the outside edge
pushed back to the bowler
floated up outside off; Ramandeep leans forward to drive and gets beaten on the outside edge
width on offer; cut to deep backward point
googly; leg-lined; worked to square leg
full delivery; Rinku gets forward to wristily knock it to long-on
stylish shot! Tossed up full and outside off; Ramandeep leans across; bends his back leg and batters it through extra cover
pushed to cover
inside-halves the push towards square leg for a sharp single
89.9kph; flighted delivery; full ball; Rinku pushes towards point for a quick single
93.4kph; flighted delivery; leg-lined; clipped through midwicket
fullish on off; blocked off the front foot

ball_event: out Bowled!! Dragged on! Maiden IPL wicket for Yash Raj Punja. Touch quicker
event_info: full and outside off; Ramandeep tries to reach for it as he leans across to drive. All he manages is an inside edge and ends up dragging it onto his stumps. Ramandeep is in disbelief. He's down on his haunches before taking the long walk back. Ramandeep Singh b Yash Raj Punja 10(13) [4s-1]
bowls the leggie to the new batter; Anukul misses the glance to get hit on the front pad. There's an appeal for lbw but that's missing leg
95.7kph; quicker one outside off; Anukul cuts off the back foot; can't beat backward point

95.1kph; Yash Raj Punja attacks the stumps; Rinku makes room to cut it to backward point. A misfield allows the batters to take the single. Yash Raj Punja finishes with 1/25 on his debut after a tough first over in the powerplay
83.1kph; round the wicket; tossed up delivery; drifting down leg; Rinku looks to play the vertical-batted sweep and inside-edges to short fine leg
80.7kph; offbreak that spins a bit; middle-stump line and Anukul nudges it into the leg-side
84.8kph; full delivery; driven along the ground to long-off
RR appeal for caught behind but that's been wided. Full and down leg; Rinku looks to sweep fine and misses
83.4kph; airy delivery; Rinku shimmies down the track and smashes it over the bowler's head. Much-needed for Rinku and KKR
leg-lined; Rinku nudges this length ball to short fine leg
86.8kph; Anukul moves leg-side to go inside-out and miscues. Donovan Ferreira runs in from long-off and puts in the dive but it falls short of him. Excellent effort but the batters take two
full and in the slot. Rinku is down on one leg to nail the slogsweep over deep midwicket
short of length down leg; left alone
1 run; quick again; leg-lined at 104.9kph; Rinku swings across the line and misses. The ball rolls towards short fine off his body
cut to deep extra cover
flighted delivery; full and down leg; second wide of the over
fullish googly outside off; Anukul reaches for it to slap-drive it to deep point
quick and on the pads; Rinku clips through midwicket

six to start the over and six to end the over. 19 runs off the over. Full and outside off; allows Anukul to free his arms and that's been bludgeoned over deep extra cover with a good swing of the willow
good start to the over for KKR! Short ball from round the wicket; Rinku gets inside the line; waits for the slower ball and hooks it over short fine leg. One bounce and into the fence
spears in a yorker down leg. Even though Rinku shuffled; the line was well down leg
long-off moved to mid-off just before the ball. Jofra bowls full; Rinku shuffles across and plays an aerial drive right into the gap between mid-off and cover. Pressure on Jofra now!
length ball outside off; Rinku walks across and opens the bat-face to steer it to deep backward point
yorker length on middle-leg; flicked to deep midwicket
full toss and Jofra gets away as Rinku just knocks it down to long-on for a single

bouncer outside off; Anukul Roy looks to play the upper-cut and misses. Wide not given and KKR review it. This is touch-and-go. Let's see what the technology says. Head height - 1.79m; ball height is 1.77m. So; it's a fair delivery. KKR have lost both their reviews now
Rinku walks across and lets this short of a good length ball go through to the keeper as the line is down leg. Not wided by Kumar Dharmasena as the batter moved across

Rinku gets down low to slog it away and misses this full ball. Rinku is angry that it's not wided. He signals T but KKR have lost both their reviews. It was actually the right call from the ump as it was pretty close to the leg-stump and Rinku had shuffled as well
slower ball bouncer; too short and too wide outside off. This one is definitely a wide
108.1kph; slow; into the deck and down leg. Rinku walks across to pul and gets a faint under-edge that foes to the keeper on the bounce
Rinku backs away to whip this full toss to deep square leg
edge and four! Pacy length ball; Anukul clears his front leg to swing across the line. Gets an inside-edge onto his thigh and the ball dribbles away to third man for four
very full; Anukul can't get under it and drills it to long-off. Just 7 runs off the over
over the wicket; very full and on the stumps; on-pace; Anukul makes room to drive hard and Parag makes a tumbling stop to his left at mid-off
146.3kph; yorker length; Rinku drives hard and jams it along the ground to long-on

Jofra misses his mark and that's been dispatched. Didn't miss by a long way though. Anukul knows that it's going to be very full. Stays deep; clears his front leg and thumps it over long-off. Good strike. Right off the meat of the bat
nails the yorker on this occasion does Jofra and Anukul squeezes it to deep point
in the blockhole from round the wicket; Rinku opens the bat-face to send it through point for another single
low full toss; Anukul swings hard and miscues towards the mid-off region. Rinku runs hard and comfortably comes back for the second. 12 runs off the over
boundary to start the over! Off-speed short of length ball outside leg; Rinku waits and swivels to pull it behind square on the leg-side
slow; full and outside off; Rinku stays leg-side and belts it through extra cover. Bullets away to the fence
length ball; Rinku bends his back leg to swing across the line and misses to get hit on the pad. Anukul Roy is almost halfway down the pitch; gets sent back
first win of the season for KKR! Banged in short and Rinku swivels to hook it over fine leg. Goes all the way. Fifty for Rinku Singh as well
